meta.title: Fix Your Funnel, Lower Your Cost-Per-Lead
meta.description: You're already running ads — but leads slip through the gap between attention and conversion. We build full-funnel growth systems: ads, landing pages, qualification, nurture, and CRM. Get a free funnel audit.

hero.subheadline: Most businesses at your stage are generating interest — but losing leads in the gap between attention and conversion. We close that gap with a full-funnel system: ads, landing pages, lead qualification, nurturing, and CRM integration.
hero.trust: Takes 20 minutes. We map your funnel, find the gaps, show you the fix. Zero obligation.

problem.title: The growth plateau is real. Here's what's causing it.

items.pain: Leads come in but don't convert.
items.note: No nurture system means interest cools before it turns into revenue.

items.pain: Ad spend is rising but cost-per-lead isn't improving.
items.note: You're paying more to fill a leaky funnel instead of fixing the leaks.

items.pain: You run Facebook AND Google, but they aren't coordinated.
items.note: Two channels working against each other waste budget and muddy your data.

items.pain: No clear attribution — you don't know which channel actually works.
items.note: Without attribution you're optimizing blind and scaling the wrong things.

items.pain: Your team follows up manually — inefficient and inconsistent.
items.note: Hot leads go cold while follow-up sits in someone's inbox.

problem.empathy: You don't have a traffic problem — you have a conversion problem. The fix isn't more spend, it's a system that captures, qualifies, and converts what you're already paying for.

funnel.title: Our full-funnel growth architecture
funnel.intro: Five connected layers that turn ad clicks into pipeline. Each layer plugs the leak the one above it creates.

layers.title: Paid Traffic
layers.desc: Meta + Google Ads, coordinated — not two disconnected campaigns competing for the same budget.

layers.title: Landing Pages
layers.desc: High-converting, A/B tested, mobile-optimized pages built to turn clicks into qualified leads.

layers.title: Lead Qualification
layers.desc: Smart forms plus call qualification flows that filter for fit before a lead reaches your team.

layers.title: Lead Nurturing
layers.desc: Email sequences, SMS, and retargeting that keep you top of mind until the lead is ready to buy.

layers.title: CRM Integration
layers.desc: Leads auto-enter your pipeline with full context — nothing slips through the cracks.

services.title: Everything in the growth system

items.title: Website & landing page optimization
items.desc: Conversion-focused pages, continuously A/B tested to lift your lead-to-customer rate.

items.title: Meta Ads management
items.desc: Advanced targeting, lookalike audiences, and retargeting that lowers cost-per-lead over time.

items.title: Google Ads
items.desc: Search, Display, and Performance Max campaigns to capture demand across the whole journey.

items.title: Lead qualification system
items.desc: Smart forms and call flows that pre-qualify leads so your team only talks to real buyers.

items.title: Email & SMS nurture sequences
items.desc: Automated follow-up that nurtures every lead until they're ready — no manual chasing.

items.title: CRM setup & integration
items.desc: Your own branded pipeline so every lead is tracked, scored, and accounted for.

services.note: Monthly strategy call + performance dashboard included. Add-ons: your own CRM, AI-powered follow-up automation (instant 24/7 response), phone campaign management, and campaign A/B testing.

methodology.title: Why our system outperforms standard agency approaches
points: We don't just run ads — we own the entire lead journey, from first click to closed deal.
Proprietary qualification — we pre-sell leads before they reach you, so your team closes warm.
Multi-channel attribution so you know exactly what's working and where to put the next dollar.
Monthly optimization cycles backed by data, not guesses — every change is measured against results.

testimonials.quote: We were spending more every month and getting the same number of leads. New Age rebuilt our funnel and our cost-per-lead dropped by nearly half in a quarter.
testimonials.name: Daniel R.

testimonials.quote: The qualification system was the game-changer. Our sales team stopped wasting time on tire-kickers and our close rate more than doubled.
testimonials.name: Elena M.

testimonials.quote: For the first time we can see exactly which channel drives revenue. We cut what wasn't working and doubled down on what was.
testimonials.name: Marcus T.

leadSection.title: Get a free funnel audit
leadSection.subtitle: We'll map your current funnel, find exactly where you're losing money, and show you what a fixed system looks like. 20 minutes, zero obligation.
bullets: A clear map of your current funnel

finalCta.title: Stop losing leads in the gap.
finalCta.subtitle: You're already paying for the traffic. Let's build the system that actually converts it into pipeline.
finalCta.microcopy: 20 minutes, zero obligation. We reply fast — usually the same day.

footer.tagline: We build full-funnel growth systems that turn ad spend into predictable pipeline.
